player_value: Six high-frequency Alpha commodities gain immediately distinct silhouettes and industry palettes, proving a scalable path from six shared category glyphs toward readable per-product identity.

integration_request.request: Add one read-only product-art catalog/adapter that consumes this proof manifest for commodity cards and Product Codex thumbnails. Missing product IDs must retain the existing semantic icon fallback.
must_not: make this art manifest a gameplay owner
change product identity or industry membership
remove fallback behavior for the remaining 40 products

acceptance: all six product IDs belong to the Alpha 0.1 manifest
the authoritative product catalog confirms one item per industry
all PNGs are 512x512 RGBA with transparent backgrounds
committed and raw-source SHA-256 values are unique and pinned
pairwise visual signatures remain above the manifest similarity threshold
the six-entry contact sheet is generated from the manifest
no production UI, scene, rule, Alpha manifest, product catalog, or shared art manifest is modified
